title: Properties of Minimum Mean Square Error (MMSE) Forecasts
description: A flowchart illustrating the key properties and derivation of MMSE forecasts in time series analysis.
elements: Properties: Unbiasedness, Minimum Variance, Confidence Intervals
relationships: Data is used to estimate the model
Estimated model generates the forecast equation
Forecast equation produces a point forecast
Forecast error is the difference between actual future value and forecast
The error term's properties define the forecast's properties (unbiased, minimum variance) and allow for the construction of confidence intervals
